caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with tan suspenders and a red bow tie. He wears large black headphones and a distinctive, tall, grey peaked wig. He is positioned behind a black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a garment rack with clothing. On-screen text and logos appear in the lower sections of the scene, including "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in place, his expression shifting slightly as he appears to be speaking or listening. He looks forward and slightly to the side, with minimal movement in his posture across the duration of the clip. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on the man from the chest up.
